keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Barbados 1, Aruba 0. Omani Leacock (Barbados) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Barbados 1, Aruba 1. Diederick Luydens (Aruba) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Jillroy Ruiz following a corner.
Nickenson Paul (Aruba) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jaylan Gilkes (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Aruba. Edhyon Hersilia replaces Kymani Nedd because of an injury.
First Half ends, Barbados 1, Aruba 1.
Substitution, Barbados. Sheran Hoyte replaces Jaylan Gilkes.
Second Half begins Barbados 1, Aruba 1.
Walter Bennett (Aruba) Yellow Card at 60'
Substitution, Aruba. Jaybrien Romano replaces Bradley Martis because of an injury.

Second Half ends, Barbados 1, Aruba 1.
